cards.title: Bounded Memory and Approximation
cards.governance_note: Document retained state, sketch choice, sampling design, error bounds, and uncertainty language.

cards.title: Time, Windows, and Late Data
cards.governance_note: Specify event time, processing time, watermarks, windows, late-data handling, and revision policies.

cards.title: Alerts, Retention, and Privacy
cards.governance_note: Govern alert response, backpressure, dropped events, retention, deletion, privacy, and communication of real-time limits.
